标题:
Celin / Autumn-Winter New Color Wool Slippers

This year’s wool is all straight hair, giving a softer, lighter, and more flowing feel. This season’s Celin wool slippers made me fall in love all over again! With so many beautiful shoes this season, these wool slippers are irresistibly cute.

The fluffy wool is made from imported European Grade A pure wool, with no synthetic fibers at all! Perfect for early winter outdoor wear—fashionable and versatile. How can you not love them?

Fluffy slippers are a must-have autumn-winter bestseller. They match effortlessly with pants, shorts, coats, down jackets, and even socks. Super versatile—everyone needs a pair!

✔️ Size: - (Custom made, no returns or exchanges)

Celine 25SS Summer New Arrival Triomphe Spring Best-Selling Sandals. Perfect with socks for summer, combining vintage charm with top-tier fashion. Genuine leather upper and lining, original durable suede outsole. Sizes 35-41 (sizes 40-41 are custom orders, no returns).

Celine 25SS Summer New Arrival Triomphe Spring Best-Selling Sandals. Perfect with socks for summer, combining vintage charm with top-tier fashion. Genuine leather upper and lining, original durable suede outsole. Sizes 35-41 (sizes 40-41 are custom orders, no returns).

Celine 25SS Spring/Summer new arrival sandals, Arc de Triomphe British style flat micro-logo slides. Simple, elegant, and stylish—timeless fashion classic. Vintage British design adds unique charm.  
Material: Original imported cowhide woven upper  
Lining: Cowhide  
Sole: Genuine leather sole  
Sizes: 35-40 (Size 40 made-to-order, no returns or exchanges)

CELINE 24 Mary Jane Shoes, as worn by Gao Yuanyuan. Easy to wear, made of soft patent leather for added style. This shoe challenges the stereotype that patent leather is stiff and uncomfortable—this pair is very soft. Vintage-style T-bar patent leather flats, slimming and beautiful on the foot. Features CELINE’s exclusive refined Arc de Triomphe logo—stunning!  
- Upper: Premium original cowhide  
- Lining: Top-grade mixed lambskin  
- Sole: Genuine Italian cowhide leather  
- Sizes: 35-40 (size 40 made to order, no returns)

3-color √ Celine

Replica-level thick-soled CELINE RUNNER sneakers featuring CELINE logos on the tongue and heel tab. Embossed CELINE branding on heel and side. Thick-soled "bread" style, spring-summer new women's model with Arc de Triomphe logo, lace-up design—simple, comfortable, clean, and sleek, enhancing height and slimming legs. Perfect worn alone or with wide-leg pants for a high-street vintage look. Upper: original imported cowhide. Lining: original interior. Outsole: original molded TPU sole. Size: #- (custom order, no returns or exchanges).

Celine Fall/Winter New Retro Chunky Heel Long Boots. This season, Celine offers many stunning styles. For example, these combat boots have a cool biker vibe. Celine Thick-Soled Loafers Series Casual Leather Shoes

This extremely popular style features custom-molded hardware on every panel, perfectly matching the original in size and texture. The upper is made from imported edge-stitched calf leather, with finely hand-stitched moccasin seams. The lining is lambskin, with soft lambskin insoles for comfort. The sole is a custom genuine leather original replica, delivering a perfect fit and excellent comfort. Versatile for pairing with jeans, blazers, or skirts. Comes with full authentic packaging.

Sole: Original replica composite sole  
Heel height: cm  
Sizes: Custom made

This season, CELINE has won my heart again! With so many beautiful shoes this season, these wool slippers are irresistibly cute.  
The fluffy wool is made from imported European Grade A wool, matching the original exactly with 100% pure wool—no synthetic fibers at all!  
✔️ Upper: Imported Grade A wool  
✔️ Sole: Durable TPU sole, same as original
